CreateVolume.zoneName: Availability zone name; defaults to empty, selected automatically by the system.
CreateVolume.storageType: CDS disk storage type: enhanced_ssd_pl0, enhanced_ssd_pl1, enhanced_ssd_pl2, enhanced_ssd_pl3, cloud_hp1/premium_ssd (General SSD), hp1/ssd (High-performance cloud disk), elastic_ephemeral_disk (Elastic ephemeral disk - standard). Default: hp1.
CreateVolume.cdsSizeInGB: Disk size in GB; enhanced_ssd_pl1/pl2/pl3 support purchasing additional I/O performance.
CreateVolume.cdsExtraIo: Extra I/O performance configuration for the disk.
CreateVolume.snapshotId: Snapshot ID for creating a disk from a snapshot. When specified and non-empty, cdsSizeInGB is ignored and becomes optional.
CreateVolume.shareSnapshotId: Shared snapshot ID for creating a disk from a shared snapshot. When specified and non-empty, cdsSizeInGB is ignored and becomes optional.
CreateVolume.enableDeleteProtection: Whether to enable disk release protection.
CreateVolume.instanceId: Create and attach the disk to the specified instance. Prepaid CDS must be attached to a prepaid BCC. Note: when attaching a prepaid CDS to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS auto-renewal is activated with the same renewal cycle as the BCC instance.
CreateVolume.name: Disk name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65.
CreateVolume.description: Disk description; supports Chinese characters, letters, digits, and the following characters: . space _ - = , ， ： / 。
CreateVolume.renewTimeUnit: Renewal time unit: "month" for monthly, "year" for yearly. Deprecated: when attaching a prepaid CDS to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS renewal cycle follows the BCC instance automatically.
CreateVolume.renewTime: Auto-renewal duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–3 for yearly. Deprecated: when attaching a prepaid CDS to a BCC with auto-renewal enabled, the CDS renewal cycle follows the BCC instance automatically.
CreateVolume.relationTag: Whether to associate the specified tags with existing tag keys. Defaults to false. When true, ensure the tag key already exists.
CreateVolume.billing: Custom renewal duration in months. Empty means aligned with the attached BCC expiration time. Custom duration must be greater than (BCC expiration time − CDS current expiration time); supported range: 1–60 months.
CreateVolume.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance).
CreateVolume.billing.reservation: Reservation settings; required for Prepaid, not needed for Postpaid.
CreateVolume.chargeType: Billing type: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required only when instanceId is non-empty and the instance is prepaid. If instanceId is empty, a postpaid CDS is created. If instanceId is non-empty: specify chargeType for prepaid instances; postpaid CDS is created for postpaid instances.
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy: Snapshot policy currently configured for the disk (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.id: Auto snapshot policy ID (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.name: Auto snapshot policy name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65 (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.timePoints: Scheduled creation time points for auto snapshots. Minimum unit: hour; 24 options from 00:00–23:00 (values 0–23). Multiple time points allowed. Format: JSON array [0, 1, ... 23], max 24 entries, comma-separated (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.repeatWeekdays: Repeat days for auto snapshots. Select days Monday–Sunday (values 0–6, where 0 = Monday). Multiple days allowed. Format: JSON array [0, 1...6] (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.status: Snapshot policy status: active, deleted, or paused (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.retentionDays: Retention period for auto snapshots in days. -1: retain permanently; 1–65536: retain for specified days (returned in disk detail query).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.createdTime: Creation time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format (this and subsequent fields are not returned in volume APIs).
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.updatedTime: Last update time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format.
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.deletedTime: Deletion time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format.
CreateVolume.autoSnapshotPolicy.lastExecuteTime: Last execution time of the auto snapshot policy, in BCE date format.
CreateVolume.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk with instance. Takes effect only for postpaid billing; initial value is false. V2 API requires cdsAttributeActive=true when releasing the instance.
CreateVolume.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete existing auto snapshots.
CreateVolume.purchaseCount: Number of CDS disks to create in batch; must be a positive integer, max 5 per request. Optional; defaults to 1.
